ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stock price */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country that uses the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the trading account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account that owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was sold */,
  "selling_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was sold */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain or loss from the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account that made the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was made */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the transaction */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax paid for the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the account */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_access_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management setting */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account that owns the risk management setting */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price for the trading account */,
  "position_sizing" REAL /* Position sizing for the trading account */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage for the trading account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that exhibits the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., uptrend, downtrend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that the indicator is tracking */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that the trading signal is related to */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading signal (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading signal */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the trading signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that the performance metric is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the notification was sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
